content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with strong global cues (Nasdaq +2%, S&P +1.46%) lifting risk assets. Multiple holdings showing solid Q4 prints (PNBHOUSING, ADANIPORTS, NAVINFLUOR, COFORGE, MARICO, GRSE, CAMS, ABCAPITAL) — book is well-positioned. Focus this tick is trailing SLs on winners and tight risk management; new entries selectively into clean setups not extended.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24500,
      "nifty_resistance": 25200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1056.70 vs entry 984 = +7.4% unrealized. Stored SL 1035 is already above entry (locked-in gain). Holding SL/target unchanged — CMP-SL gap is ~2% which is healthy noise tolerance. No-op MODIFY avoided; effectively HOLD with locked SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 124.12 vs entry 125.10 = -0.8%. SL 121 (-3.3% from entry), target 135. Gold consolidating; safe-haven hedge intact. SL room appropriate for ETF volatility. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1730.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1757.10 vs entry 1700 = +3.4%. Stored SL 1730 already at entry+1.8% (breakeven+). Q4 strong, broke 52w high. CMP-SL gap ~1.5% — leaving room for noise. No change needed; SL already trailed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 4630.40 vs entry 4575 = +1.2%. SL 4540 (-0.8% from entry, -2% from CMP). Defense rally intact, new CMD catalyst, order book Rs 2.54L cr. SL gap appropriate. Hold; will trail if cross +2%."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6900.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 7049 vs entry 6900 = +2.2%. SL already at entry (breakeven lock). CMP-SL gap ~2.1% — within noise tolerance, do not tighten further given high-volatility name (ATR moves 200+). Q4 PAT +124% YoY exceptional; thesis intact. No-op MODIFY avoided; HOLD effectively with breakeven SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 845.20 vs entry 838 = +0.9%. SL 830 (-1.0% from entry, -1.8% from CMP). Capital goods/rail rally; sector momentum strong. Hold to allow setup to develop; will revisit if cross +2.5%."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 363.00,
      "new_target": 388.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 368.70 vs entry 369 = flat (-0.08%). SL 363 (-1.6% from entry, -1.5% from CMP). Q4 beat, fresh ATH zone, NBFC tailwinds. CMP-SL gap appropriate at ~1.5%. No change to stored levels; HOLD effectively."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 822.55 vs entry 820 = +0.3%. ATH 843 today, Q4 print exceptional (+22% revenue, +18% PAT). SL 815 (-0.6% entry, -0.9% from CMP) — at the 1% trail-floor; no further tightening. Hold stored levels."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1279.10 vs entry 1259 = +1.6%. SL 1245 (-1.1% entry, -2.7% CMP). Blockbuster Q4 (PAT +130%, revenue +29%), 10% upper circuit yesterday. SL room appropriate for high-vol IT name. Will trail if cross +2.5%."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 3034 vs entry 3025 = +0.3%. SL 2990 (-1.2% entry, -1.5% CMP). Defense shipbuilder, Q4 EBITDA +61%, Rs 33,000cr corvette pipeline. Volatile name (3074H/2926L today range ~5%); SL gap appropriate."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 807.30 vs entry 806 = +0.2%. SL 795 (-1.4% entry, -1.5% CMP). Q4 EBITDA all-time high, 68% MF RTA share. SL appropriately placed. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already locked above entry at +5%; CMP-SL gap 2% adequate. Will trail to 1045 if 1080 broken."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position; momentum stalled but structurally sound. SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1730.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven+1.8%. CMP-SL gap 1.5% adequate; do not tighten further."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 4540.00,
      "reasoning": "Position only +1.2%; trail SL up if cross +2% to 4575 (entry/breakeven)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 6900.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven; high-vol name needs the 2%+ gap room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 830.00,
      "reasoning": "Marginally green; let setup develop."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 363.00,
      "reasoning": "Flat from entry; Q4 strong; SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "reasoning": "Marginally green; FMCG leader print exceptional. SL at 1% trail-floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1245.00,
      "reasoning": "+1.6% only; blockbuster Q4 thesis intact; let it develop."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2990.00,
      "reasoning": "Volatile name; SL gap 1.5% appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 795.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 earnings binary already cleared; thesis confirmed; SL well-placed."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "POLYCAB and SRF look attractive on chart but book is already heavily deployed across 11 names. M&M, AUROPHARMA, HDFCBANK noted but no fresh capacity given concentration. NEULANDLAB has board meeting May 12 (3 sessions) — explicit binary-event NO_ACTION on new entry. CAMS Q4 already printed clean. CHENNPETRO (prior failure) avoided. COFORGE upper-circuited — chasing extended is poor R:R; passing on add. With 11 names already holding and book concentrated, no new BUY justified this tick. Open HFCL BUY @ 133.50 from 30 hours ago is stale — should be cancelled.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is heavily deployed across 11 CNC names (most opened today/recently). Cumulative experiment P&L still -53.72% — capital preservation is paramount. Today's job is monitoring trail-points on multiple recent entries, not adding more correlated risk. Sector clusters: Capital Goods (HAL, GRSE, TITAGARH), Financials (PNBHOUSING, ABCAPITAL, CAMS), Chemicals (NAVINFLUOR) — Capital Goods cluster is at ceiling; no further additions there. Stale HFCL pending order should be addressed but no CANCEL action available in schema; will let it expire EOD."
}
